title: SpaceX's Secret Reentry Capsule + Agility Robotics Goes Public
description:
Hey everyone, welcome back to Deeptech Daily. It's Wednesday, June 24, 2026, and we've got a packed show today — a mysterious SpaceX mission, a humanoid robot company heading to Wall Street, and a drone startup raising half a billion euros. Let's get into it.

We're starting with SpaceX, because of...
